description: Draft a kinematic schematic of a double-stage scissor lift in LibreCAD based on specifications provided in '~/Documents/lift_specs.txt' (arm length 3000mm, angle 35 degrees). The drawing must start at (0,0) and utilize specific layers: STRUCTURE (Red), PINS (Yellow), PLATFORM (Cyan), and DIMENSIONS (White). Include 40mm diameter pivot pins at all joints and a vertical dimension indicating the total platform height. Save the completed drawing to '~/Documents/LibreCAD/scissor_lift_study.dxf'.
